footer.address: 6th of October - Central Axis - Next to Al Saraya Hotel and La Cité Plaza Mall - 3 Solimar Buildings behind Al Hosary Square
footer.description: A specialized center for comprehensive physical therapy and rehabilitation. We provide integrated and customized treatment programs to improve quality of life and reduce pain, using the latest technologies and working according to the highest health care standards.

about.title: Our Vision, Mission, and Values
about.vision_desc: To be a leading center in the field of physical therapy and rehabilitation, by providing integrated treatment services with high professional standards, and contributing to improving the quality of life for our patients and helping them regain their activity and independence.
about.mission_desc: We strive to provide specialized physical therapy care based on modern scientific foundations, through a qualified team that puts the patient's needs first, we are committed to providing customized treatment plans, and a safe and supportive environment, with a commitment to transparency and continuous development to ensure the best treatment results.
about.values_desc: We believe that the patient is at the heart of everything we do, we are committed to providing professional care based on modern scientific foundations, through a qualified team that develops a customized treatment plan for each case that ensures the best possible results.
